message:
feat(grep): merge overlapping context windows in GrepTool output

Refactor GrepTool rendering to group matches by file and coalesce
overlapping or adjacent context ranges into single contiguous blocks.
Uses binary_search on sorted match lines to distinguish match lines (:)
from context lines (-) and inserts -- separators between non-contiguous
blocks within the same file, matching standard grep behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
